author: y4rr
content: LRASPP MobileNetV3-Large architecture added (lraspp.rs + extended mobilenet.rs with mobilenet_v3_large). Backbone: MobileNetV3-Large dilated to output_stride=16; head: high (1x1 conv from C5), gate (avgpool + 1x1 + sigmoid), low_classifier (40 ch C2), high_classifier (128 ch combined). 21 VOC classes. PASS first-try: max_abs=0.016, argmax_agree ≥99.99% all 5 images. Pinned to ferrotorch/lraspp_mobilenet_v3_large (SHA f78b07d0b8a4).
